//: Photo gallery upload routes need extra time + memory for sharp.
sharp decodes the source JPEG + composites an SVG watermark for a
preview (1600px) and thumbnail (500px), then uploads three files to
Supabase Storage. On a 12 MB phone photo this can peak around 700 MB
and exceed the default 10s function timeout on cold starts. 3009 MB
is Vercel's max on Pro; scales CPU proportionally, which is what
libvips actually needs. maxDuration 60s covers cold-start + Supabase.
